data.name: 東京SEX区
data.detailed_description:
• Strategic Deck-Building RPG:
    A card battle where the three attributes of "Mind, Technique, Body" and cost management are key.
    Strengthen your deck while earning funds through "Work" and aim for the strongest composition.

  • Love Conquest Starting with "Work":
    A game cycle where you use the funds you've earned to invite the high-class heroines on dates.
    By choosing options that cater to their tastes and fetishes, their attitudes will change to become sweeter or more depraved.

  • Heroines with Rich Attributes +α:
    Chaste "Married Woman", “Unemotional Lady” and more.
    Completely subdue these peculiar women with your skill.

Story

Welcome to the dream paradise where men are an endangered species!

A special ward constructed on Tokyo Bay, the "Tokyo Satellite EXamination District"

— commonly known as "SEX District".

This is a dream city where men are extremely scarce and women overflowing with unspent sexual desire abound.

Waiting for you are some unique areas and high-class heroines who won't be easily conquered.

To woo them, you'll need funds for dates.

But don't worry—women everywhere are looking for naughty “work.”

Work according to your desires, earn, and bring them down...

Begin your own hedonistic life!

Game System

“Tokyo SEX District” is an Area Conquest Adventure RPG.

You earn funds while strengthening your deck through "Work",

capture the heroines' hearts with "Dates",

and aim for complete conquest in the final "Climax”.

  • "Work" ―― Strategic Card Battle
    In "Work," you satisfy the female customers (enemies) in the city to earn money.
    Construct your deck by utilizing cards with "Mind, Technique, Body" attributes. Cost management and attribute compatibility are the keys to conquest.
    Satisfy many customers with your ultimate deck!

  • "Date" ―― Bring Down the Heroines



    Use the money you've earned to invite the area's top "high-class women" on a date.
    Their reactions change based on your choices.
    Breaking their brazen attitude, or exposing their hidden fetishes...
    Choose the correct options and melt away the women's inhibitions.

  • "Climax"―― Last Step of Colluption



    The climax for each area is a direct confrontation with the "high-class women."
    Use the women' tastes and fetishes you observed on the dates, and select the choices that will bring them down.
    By continuously choosing the correct answers within the time limit, they will completely submit to you (stage clear).

Characters

The city is divided into some areas, and a distinctive heroine awaits you in each.

  • [Married Woman] Madoka Kokonoe
    "...That's filthy. Such acts will disturb the peace of the apartment complex."

    The chaste community leader living in the 'MILF Heights,' who values propriety.
    Outwardly, she despises filthy acts, but secretly harbors a strong, repressed sexual desire.
    Let's give her a thrill called a sense of immorality.

  • [Mysterious] Hotaru Hikami
    "If you can quench my dry body, then..."

    A mysterious woman watching you from somewhere.
    Her true identity will be revealed near the end of the story.

Are you ready to “teach a lesson” to those out-of-reach beauties?

Add it to your wish list now and complete your registration for “Tokyo SEX District”!

data.short_description: Welcome to the secret, super-naughty paradise known as “Tokyo SEX District”! This simulation RPG combines the strategic card game ‘Work’ with the quiz-style “Date” mode, allowing you to turn that unattainable beauty into your very own woman.
data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-6100 / AMD Ryzen 3 1200
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 750 Ti / AMD Radeon R7 260X
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX compatible sound card
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-8400 / AMD Ryzen 5 2600
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1060 / AMD Radeon RX 580
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX compatible sound card
